messages.text:
<!channel> To expand on the above post, here's the agenda for today:
1. Stage Gate: 
    a. PCO update. 
        i. Have we heard back from Polyset? What's the next step for either answer
        ii. Do we have an update on pricing yet? 
    b. Polymer emulsions (i.e. SBS with SESO/AESO). What are the next steps to move that forward? 
2. Brainstorming/general development things:
    a. What's our bandwidth for development? How many people and how many hours?
    b. What other things can we use this PCO-type formulation for (i.e. crack seal, cold-patch, cold-in-place, etc.)
    c. Industrial cleaners. We came up with several ideas, let's narrow it down to a couple of targeted things and have someone take ownership
Nothing from Nil, probably travel abroad...call tomorrow
Let not worry too much about polyset

<!channel> <https://docs.google.com/document/d/15oH6i3OAyYupGBWT6CK2kNeDxGl6HeFCu-CK38tXuuA/edit?pli=1|here >is a document detailing the discussion we had today. There is required input from most folks in this channel. Take a look and provide feedback.
